description.value:
Techniques: Green

Genjutsu your Puppet casts can now become even stronger with the help of allies.

Genjutsu your Puppet casts gain a +1 bonus to Save DC.

When your Puppet Tool would cast a Genjutsu, up to three other allied creatures within 45 feet can spend chakra equal to half the jutsu's cost to embolden its effects.

Each time an ally spends chakra to aid your Puppet Tool in casting the jutsu, the jutsu gains one of the following effects (Pick one).

When at least one allied creature aids the Puppet in casting a Genjutsu this way, the Genjutsu is treated as having the Combination keyword.

• +2 damage dice as psychic damage, once per casting.

• +15ft of range or increase the area of effect by 5ft.

• Pick one of the following conditions.
On a failed save, the creature gains 1 rank of your chosen condition (Concussed or Dazzled).
The condition gained lasts until the end of the creature's next turn.

• Increase the damage die of the Genjutsu by 1 step (this option can only be taken once).

• +1 to critical threat range (this option can only be taken once) • -1 to Critical Failure range (This option can only be taken once).

activation.condition: When your Puppet Tool would cast a Genjutsu,
